name: CDM 2015 — Construction (Design and Management) Regulations
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that enforce the duties imposed by the Construction (Design and Management) Regulations 2015 (HSE). Covers duty-holder appointments (Client, Principal Designer, Principal Contractor, Designers, Contractors, Workers), F10 notification thresholds (>30 days with >20 workers simultaneously, OR >500 person-days), Construction Phase Plan, Pre-Construction Information and Health & Safety File obligations.
